behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path, the field names (cloudWatchLoggingConfiguration.logGroupName), and the fallback string /aws/emr-serverless which is what tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug symptom and expected behavior but doesn't prescribe exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests execute the extracted log_group expression with various inputs and assert on outputs only, so alternative correct implementations (e.g., conditional if/else) would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract the actual expression from source and execute it via subprocess, checking runtime behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_log_group_extraction_from_nested_config requires the custom log group to be returned, which a stub returning default would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three example configurations in instruction.md are covered by tests, including the custom log group case.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are separated into named functions with docstrings covering different scenarios.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file to modify which is appropriate scoping; doesn't identify the exact buggy line.
